description: Used gripper_roll=0 for a standing thin upright object. Fingers opened vertically, could not grip the sides.

bad_example.what_happened: Fingers tried to close top-to-bottom on a tall box — no grip surface

correct_pattern.rule: For any thin object standing upright (like a long standing box or pencil), use gripper_roll=90 so fingers open HORIZONTALLY and can wrap around the object sides.

gripper_roll_guide.roll=0: fingers open VERTICALLY  — good for flat objects lying down
gripper_roll_guide.roll=90: fingers open HORIZONTALLY — good for standing thin objects
